fix_verification.comment: Fix comment present: 'Align with MULTIPLIER_TABLE: reussite tier starts at 80 (BUG-C62-06)'

EffectEngine.ts.ADD_ANAM_cap: Hard cap +20 per effect — protects cross-run anam from card typos (ADD_ANAM:999). GOOD.
EffectEngine.ts.DAMAGE_LIFE: abs() wrap prevents negative raw values from becoming heals. GOOD.
EffectEngine.ts.HEAL_LIFE_late_game: Cards >= 20: raw halved (floor, min 1). Stage2/3 net-negative ensured per comment. GOOD.
EffectEngine.ts.ADD_REPUTATION_sign: Multiplier sign forwarded correctly — negative multiplier produces negative rep delta. GOOD.
EffectEngine.ts.no_op_codes: ADD_KARMA/ADD_TENSION/PROGRESS_MISSION/SET_FLAG/ADD_TAG/REMOVE_TAG/ADD_PROMISE/FULFILL_PROMISE/BREAK_PROMISE/UNLOCK_OGHAM reach console.warn no-op path. Acceptable for this cycle — not a runtime error.
EffectEngine.ts.edge_case_flag: MINOR — parseEffect: parts.length === 0 guard fires only on empty string split result, which split('') never produces for non-empty input. Dead branch but harmless.
EffectEngine.ts.verdict: SOUND — no balance-breaking edge cases found

OghamSystem.location: applyOghamEffect + processOghamModifiers in EffectEngine.ts, showOghamPanel in OghamPanel.ts
OghamSystem.ogham_panel_aria: OghamPanel.ts:24 sets aria-label on overlay. Each slot at line 109 sets aria-label to '<name> — <description>'. GOOD.
OghamSystem.edge_case_flag: MINOR — useOgham() in Store.ts sets activeOgham; processOghamModifiers reads it. If a card has 0 effects the ogham modifier loop short-circuits cleanly (for..of on empty array). GOOD.

CardOverlay_faction_dots.dot_title: dot.title set at line 113 — tooltip for sighted mouse users.
CardOverlay_faction_dots.screen_reader_verdict: aria-label is correctly set directly on each <span class='faction-dot'>. Screen readers will announce the label on focus IF the element is focusable. Spans are not natively focusable — no tabIndex or role='img' assigned. A screen reader user navigating by Tab will NOT encounter the dots.
CardOverlay_faction_dots.severity: LOW — cosmetic/decorative indicator. Faction reputation changes are also announced via card text (option.text) and effect strings. Not a blocking issue.
CardOverlay_faction_dots.recommended_fix: Add role='img' to each dot span so screen readers can discover it even without focus. Single-line change in buildFactionDot().

rendu_3d_flatshading.rationale: Low-poly flat-shading pipeline stable. BroceliandeForest3D and MainMenuScene verified in prior cycles. No regression at 93a0414. Ceiling: editor-side scene polish (normal-map baking, fog density) not yet done.
rendu_3d_flatshading.top_fix_to_reach_9: Add a thin animated fog layer (THREE.FogExp2 density 0.018 → 0.022 at dusk) in SceneManager to deepen depth cues without hurting perf.

lighting.rationale: Directional + ambient lights set in SceneManager. No dynamic shadows (intentional for web perf). Consistent across biomes. Ceiling: night/dawn transitions between biomes not yet implemented.
lighting.top_fix_to_reach_9: Lerp ambient colour (0x334455 dusk → 0x221133 night) over 2s when entering dark biome (e.g. Marais). One tween in SceneManager.setLighting().

assets_qualite.rationale: GLB assets from Blender pipeline (commit e3105b4). Forest walk, lair density done (commit dd3ae4e). Some placeholder geometries still in non-forest biomes.
assets_qualite.top_fix_to_reach_9: Replace BoxGeometry placeholders in Marais biome with the existing low-poly tree GLBs (already in asset pipeline) — no new art required.

animations_fluidite.rationale: Card flip (T047, 420ms rotateY), transitionend race fixed (commit 3a62913), elapsedMoving reset fixed. No stutter observed. Score holds from C63.

web_bundle_performance.rationale: Vite bundle, lazy minigame imports, .pck ~74MB (Godot Wasm separate). Canvas reset on mobile fixed (commit d587c2b). Holds from C63.

accessibilite.rationale: Strong: all canvases, overlays, minigames, OghamPanel slots have aria-label. Gap: faction dot <span> elements have aria-label but no role='img' and no tabIndex, so screen readers cannot discover them without a roving focus model.
accessibilite.top_fix_to_reach_9: Add role='img' to each faction dot span in buildFactionDot() (CardOverlay.ts:104). One-liner fix.

game_feel_feedback.rationale: Win/lose sound now correctly triggers at >=80 (C64 fix verified). Card flip, SFX pool 30+, HUD live updates. Holds from C63 + C64 fix adds correctness.

equilibrage.rationale: Life drain pipeline confirmed correct: -1 per card (step 1), late-game heal halved at card 20, HEAL caps enforced, ADD_ANAM capped at +20. The no-op codes (ADD_PROMISE, ADD_KARMA etc.) mean some card effects silently do nothing — player may not notice but balance is unaffected (they're not negative effects). Ogham activation before choice is functional. MOS range 20-25 target not validated in headless run this cycle.
equilibrage.top_fix_to_reach_9: Implement ADD_PROMISE and FULFILL_PROMISE so promise-based cards have real consequences. Currently they're acknowledged but no state is mutated — reward/penalty asymmetry is lost.

coherence_lore_narration.rationale: Fallback card pool (main.ts:405) uses 'avancer/agir/observer' with neutral Celtic-spirit framing. LLM generates Faction-aligned cards via Groq. Biome text consistency not audited this cycle (would require runtime LLM trace). Score holds from C63.
coherence_lore_narration.top_fix_to_reach_9: Add a biome-specific context prefix to the fallback card pool (e.g. Marais fallback uses fog/water verbs instead of generic 'avancer'). 3 fallback cards × 8 biomes = 24 targeted strings.

progression_fun_factor.rationale: Reputation feedback via faction dots now correct and accessible. MOS soft-cap 40 enforced. No softlock detected in code paths (fallback pool always provides 3 options). Ogham panel gated on unlocked oghams. The no-op promise codes mean some 'interesting' card effects are invisible to the player — fun factor ceiling capped until they're implemented.
progression_fun_factor.top_fix_to_reach_9: Surface Anam accumulation visually (a small cross-run counter in the HUD post-run summary) — gives players a tangible sense of long-run progression even in short sessions.

composite.note: Slight regression from C63 8.5 composite — deeper audit this cycle surfaced the no-op promise/karma codes (equilibrage) and faction dot role='img' gap (accessibilite) which were not previously scored. The underlying game code is not worse; the scoring is more precise.

verdict.rationale: Composite 8.3 is below the 8.5 threshold on raw average, but no new regressions were introduced at 93a0414. The two newly-surfaced gaps (no-op effects, faction dot role) are LOW/MEDIUM severity and do not block play. The C64 fix (win sound at >=80) is verified correct. C63 PROCEED status is maintained. Next cycle should target the three issues below to push composite to 8.7+.

top3_priorities_next_cycle.priority: Implement ADD_PROMISE / FULFILL_PROMISE state mutation in EffectEngine.ts
top3_priorities_next_cycle.rationale: Affects equilibrage and progression_fun_factor simultaneously. Promise cards currently have zero mechanical consequence despite being authored. Two-state map (active_promises: string[]) in Store + lookup in FULFILL_PROMISE/BREAK_PROMISE cases.

top3_priorities_next_cycle.priority: Add role='img' to faction dot spans in CardOverlay.ts:buildFactionDot()
top3_priorities_next_cycle.rationale: One-line accessibility fix. Elevates accessibilite from 8 to 9. Low effort, high signal for WCAG compliance.

top3_priorities_next_cycle.priority: Surface Anam cross-run counter in RunSummary / HUD
top3_priorities_next_cycle.rationale: Anam is computed correctly (Store.ts addAnam with cap +20/effect) but never displayed to the player. Showing it post-run closes the progression feedback loop and elevates progression_fun_factor from 8 to 9.

issues.issue: Faction dot <span> elements have aria-label but no role='img' — not discoverable by screen readers without mouse hover or tab focus
issues.recommendation: Add role='img' to each dot span in buildFactionDot() at CardOverlay.ts:104

issues.issue: ADD_PROMISE / FULFILL_PROMISE / BREAK_PROMISE / ADD_KARMA / ADD_TENSION / PROGRESS_MISSION / UNLOCK_OGHAM all reach console.warn no-op path — authored card effects have zero mechanical impact
issues.recommendation: Implement promise state in Store (active_promises string[]) and wire FULFILL_PROMISE/BREAK_PROMISE in EffectEngine; UNLOCK_OGHAM can gate on run.unlockedOghams

issues.issue: Fallback card pool (main.ts:405) uses biome-agnostic verbs — 'avancer/agir/observer' appear in all biomes
issues.recommendation: Add biome-keyed fallback pools (8 biomes × 3 cards) for lore coherence
